시편 99:1.content: Yahweh reigns! Let the peoples tremble. He sits enthroned among the cherubim. Let the earth be moved.

시편 99:2.content: Yahweh is great in Zion. He is high above all the peoples.

시편 99:3.content: Let them praise your great and awesome name. He is Holy!

시편 99:4.content: The King’s strength also loves justice. You establish equity. You execute justice and righteousness in Jacob.

시편 99:5.content: Exalt Yahweh our God. Worship at his footstool. He is Holy!

시편 99:6.content: Moses and Aaron were among his priests, Samuel was among those who call on his name. They called on Yahweh, and he answered them.

시편 99:7.content: He spoke to them in the pillar of cloud. They kept his testimonies, the statute that he gave them.

시편 99:8.content: You answered them, Yahweh our God. You are a God who forgave them, although you took vengeance for their doings.

시편 99:9.content: Exalt Yahweh, our God. Worship at his holy hill, for Yahweh, our God, is holy!
